item.title: Guess I'm boycotting ABC now.
item.description: This is getting out of hand. https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/business/story/2025-09-17/nexstars-abc-affiliates-drop-jimmy-kimmel-live-over-charlie-kirk-remarks
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: Rules for thee, not for me
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: I devote this dump to YOUR wife so I can close tabs, pt 42 ft. the majestic skedaddle bird and all the Arepo I'm aware of.
item.description:
It is actually Wednesday, my dudes, dudettes, and others. Gentle reminder to take your meds and hydrate. Take your meds with a full glass of water! That's how they're made to be taken!
Your swamp will dry out if you don't drink water. Be the bog you want to see in the world. Maintain your biodiversity!
I love this. Some comic book writers better be taking notes on this fantastic idea.
Where are you going, birb? Do you have somewhere to be? Some pressing appointment, perhaps?
I fucking love these. Happy happy birthday, happy birthday youuu
The last time I saw something by this guy was with the whole CIA Contra cocaine thing. Good stuff.
Gently spike the raccoon. Wham-splat, coon's a jumper for sure.
So goddamn good. Oh, dang. I bet a loop of this would make to fall asleep to, especially if another song is keeping you up.
How do you even come up with this concept...?
Aw. Chimp friend. As I commented on someone else's post, this shows that at least one chimp recognizes that our smiles are not dominance displays, but signs of friendship. Crazy that they're learning that their instincts aren't the be-all, end-all of social interaction.
Mm... monke.
I'm feeling good about my odds here.
I find stuff like this absolutely fascinating. Same with the one where they show how they set concrete in rivers for bridges. If there's a youtube channel for this kind of visual learning, I'd love to know about it.
Bread is so good, though. Love me some french bread. Barely toasted, plenty of butter.
Shine on, you funky little dinosaur. Peepeepeep!
It's wednesday, but we can still get tacos. Who's with me?!
Yep, fair. You and me both, sleep paralysis demon. You and me both.
What a trip. Idk, I think I'd do... most of that stuff. Probably not heroin, though.
Squid! Noodle!
I wonder if she got it eventually.
Hangry gato has much to say.
patapatapatapata
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I’m glad he passed.
item.description: Fuck Charlie Kirk. I’ll exercise my 1st amendment rights wherever I please. He was a racist piece of shit. I’m not scared of losing my job. If I do, it’s been worth it to say it out loud. I’m tired of seeing people glorify his bigoted views.
item.dc:creator: Gerdwo

item.title: Pool noodles with no pool to be found
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!

item.title: His Trumpness Dumped Across The Pond
item.description:
Big Britches Breaches Etiquette Again
The King and The Ding-a-ling
Suddenly I want to rewatch "Big Trouble in Little China", but I digress here's some pics for the big dinner.
Looking Royal
Okay Then...
Protesters toss Maybelline Queen Vance around at the Stop Trump protest in Parliament Square, London
Trump protest in London
Trump is Rage Posting at 3:30 in the morning London time
Demonstrators took to the streets of Windsor to protest "Prior" to US President Trump's visit to the UK
American Media
Scottish Media Doesn't Mess Around (Tomorrow's Front Page)
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

"We hit some new lows over the weekend with the MAGA gang desperately trying to characterize this kid who murdered Charlie Kirk as anything other than one of them, and doing everything they can to score political points from it."

item.title: Free him
item.dc:creator: ilovethiplatform

item.title: "i miss you. i miss you. i miss you."
item.description: A short video from @ zoethorogood on instagram that I found very moving and wanted to share. It makes me think of one friend of mine in particular. The caption from the original video: "(Flash warning) Little hand drawn animation and banjo theme I made. It's been a year since my brother's passing, it's hard to type stuff so I'll just let the video speak for itself. Thank you for watching. Keep going, enjoy the sandwiches." Check out the artist at https://www.instagram.com/zoethorogood
item.dc:creator: IDontBreakHeartsIDestroyThem

item.title: It's illegal to reveal this fallacy to the sensibilised brainwashed nation

item.title: Gross old perverts overwhelmingly support Cuomo
item.dc:creator: CrimsonPermanentAssurance

item.title: My Na’Vi Cosplay
item.description: Hey there! SnarkyJayCosplay here. Sharing my latest cosplay— an original design of a Na’Vi from avatar. I made all the accessories myself (every bead. every feather. no sanity left.) and even added nails to the hands to make it look more natural. I can’t say I’m a huge fan of the Avatar franchise but I love the Na’vi designs so I’m really proud of this one.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @EchidnaCandyShop made this oxtail stew! Yum.
27 Vintage Man Tax: Paul Newman
“Loving truth and living honestly is my attitude to life.” - Ba Jin I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Joe Rogan is on the approved list of state sanctioned comedy and you will laugh at it!
item.dc:creator: J2UDIGI

item.title: Oh fuck, the meme is real now?
item.description: I can’t replicate what they are talking about. I can confirm that no matter how many times I set the default to local drives, it resets back to one drive upon restart. I posted the Hank Hill meme a few weeks back and some of y’all had helpful tips for it. Sadly it seems that’s all temporary. It’s not my personal computer, it’s a work laptop. I can’t afford windows anymore for my personal use so I moved to open source.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Woohoo!
item.description: Started training at my new job this week and it is really nice having the idea that the light at the end of this tunnel isn’t an oncoming train anymore. Whew.
